title: Atlas cohort config v1
description: A cohort = one BAM list aligned to one genome plus per-sample metadata. THE OPERATIONAL UNIT engines run against. FK target for groups, candidates, results, evidence. Per HIERARCHY_SPEC.md: cohort.genome_id is the coordinate system; cohort.species_composition is derived from the samples_tsv and used to enforce the combine rule.

cohort_id.description: Unique short identifier. Used as folder slug under data/cohorts/ and as FK target. Stable forever (don't rename).

genome_id.description: FK to genome.config.genome_id. The assembly the BAMs are aligned to. Coordinates in this cohort's results are valid only against this genome.

samples_tsv.description: Path (relative to a configured root, or absolute) to the per-sample metadata TSV. Each row is one sample. Schema for rows: sample_master.schema.json. Columns include sample_id, species, origin, phenotype, family_id, bam at minimum.

species_composition.description: Set of species_ids present in this cohort. DERIVED from the unique 'species' values in samples_tsv. The atlas validates at write time that the declared composition matches the TSV. Used for the combine rule: two cohorts can be combined only if they share both genome_id AND species_composition.

n_samples.description: Number of samples in the cohort. Should match the row count in samples_tsv.

parent_cohort_ids.description: Optional FK list for derived cohorts (subset / combine). Empty for primary cohorts. For a subset: one parent. For a combine: two or more parents. The atlas validates at write time that combine parents satisfy the combine rule (same genome_id, same species_composition).

derivation.description: How this cohort relates to its parents. 'primary' = no parents (a fresh BAM list). 'subset' = derived by taking a subset of one parent's samples. 'combine' = derived by union of multiple parents' samples.

derivation_notes.description: Free-form description of how this cohort was derived. e.g. 'subset where samples_tsv.species == gariepinus' or 'union of hatchery + wild gariepinus cohorts'.

metadata.description: Cohort-level summary metadata. Sample-level metadata lives in samples_tsv, NOT here.

collection_year.description: Year (or year range) the samples were collected.

description.description: Free-form context: source population, project label, special considerations.

owner.description: Person or lab responsible for this cohort.

default_groups.description: Optional list of group_ids that should be created automatically when this cohort is registered. e.g. ['ALL'] (the trivial all-samples group) or ['hatchery_only', 'wild_only']. Each must reference a valid group_definition file.

active_in_atlas.description: True if this cohort is currently an analysis target. False = retained for reproducibility (old results still readable) but not loaded by default.

_constraints._doc: Validation constraints not directly expressible in JSON Schema. Engine enforces:
_constraints._constraint_1: genome_id must reference an existing genome.config
_constraints._constraint_2: species_composition must equal the unique set of 'species' values in samples_tsv
_constraints._constraint_3: every species_id in species_composition must exist in a registered species.config
_constraints._constraint_4: every species_id in species_composition must be in genome.species_composition (cohort cannot include species not present in its assembly)
_constraints._constraint_5_combine: if derivation == 'combine', every parent_cohort_id must reference an existing cohort, AND for every pair (A, B) of parents: A.genome_id == B.genome_id AND set(A.species_composition) == set(B.species_composition); the same rule against this cohort's own genome_id and species_composition
_constraints._constraint_6_subset: if derivation == 'subset', exactly one parent_cohort_id; this cohort's samples_tsv must be a subset of the parent's; this cohort's genome_id must equal the parent's genome_id; this cohort's species_composition must be a subset of the parent's

metadata.description: Hatchery broodlines, 5 farms in central Thailand. Mixed populations, substructure unresolved.

subset_cohort.label: Pure gariepinus samples from main_226_hatchery (subset for hybrid-aware analyses)
subset_cohort.derivation_notes: subset where samples_tsv.species == 'gariepinus' (in this case, all 226 — illustrative; would normally drop some samples)

combined_cohort.label: Combined hatchery + wild gariepinus cohort
combined_cohort.derivation_notes: Union of hatchery + wild gariepinus. Both parents have genome_id=fClaGar_pure_v1 and species_composition=[gariepinus] — combine rule satisfied.

hybrid_cohort.label: F1 hybrid validation cohort (F1 samples + pure parents alongside)

metadata.description: F1 progeny + pure parents, all aligned to the hybrid assembly. Used to validate subgenome separation before any inversion calling.
